headline: More than a decade later, the team behind N++ is back with a multiplayer sequel
summary: Metanet, the studio behind the brutally hard 2D platformer N++, is developing a new multiplayer sequel. The original N++ was a decade in the making, building off previous releases. This new title arrives over a decade after the first game's release.

headline: Grand Theft Auto VI is warping the video game release calendar
summary: Grand Theft Auto VI's impending launch is significantly influencing the entire video game release calendar. Major industry events like Summer Game Fest saw developers avoiding GTA VI's November launch window. Its anticipated release has created an empty schedule around its launch month.

headline: Final Fantasy VII’s remake trilogy will conclude with Revelation
summary: Square Enix has officially announced "Final Fantasy VII Revelation," the third and final installment in its remake trilogy. The game is set to release simultaneously on PC, PS5, Xbox Series X/S, and Nintendo Switch 2 in Spring 2027. Footage was showcased during Summer Game Fest Live.

headline: Control Resonant is a sequel — and also a starting point
summary: Chronologically, "Control Resonant" follows the events of 2019's "Control" but functions as a standalone experience. Developer Remedy views the games as two sides of the same coin, playable in any order. Creative director Mikael Kasurinen confirmed players don't need to play the original first.

headline: Fortnite Live Event Stuns Fans as The Rock's Fate Is Revealed and Ben Starr's Character Is Unmasked in Shock Twist
summary: Fortnite concluded a stunning live event that dramatically advanced the game's storyline. The event revealed the long-awaited fate of The Rock's character. Fans were surprised by a shock twist involving the unmasking of Ben Starr's character.

headline: God of War Laufey Director 'Understands' Skepticism Following Reveal, but Hopes Fans Give It a Chance
summary: Ariel Lawrence, director of "God of War Laufey," acknowledged fan skepticism after the game's reveal. Lawrence expressed hope that fans would give the new title a fair opportunity. The director's comments aim to address initial reactions from the gaming community.

headline: 007 First Light Reveals Road Map; Story DLC, New Game+, and More Coming Soon
summary: "007 First Light" unveiled its comprehensive year one road map for post-launch content. Upcoming updates include significant story DLC expansions. Players can also look forward to new features such as New Game+ and additional content.

headline: Telltale CEO Explains Why The Wolf Among Us 2 Has Taken So Long, And What Happened With That Split With Dispatch Maker Ad Hoc
summary: Telltale Games CEO Jamie Ottilie explained the extensive delays in the development of "The Wolf Among Us 2." Ottilie detailed the reasons behind restarting work on the highly anticipated sequel. The CEO also clarified the circumstances of their split with partner studio AdHoc.

headline: Downing Street hits out at 'people seeking to stir division' after Vance's Nowak post
summary: Downing Street condemned "people seeking to stir division" following a social media post by the US Vice-President. Vance referred to Henry Nowak's death on X, stating the "only response is righteous anger." The post ignited controversy and drew a strong reaction from the UK government.

headline: Buffy and Ted Lasso star Anthony Head dies at 72
summary: British actor Anthony Head, famed for roles in "Buffy the Vampire Slayer" and "Ted Lasso," has died at 72. He also appeared in popular series like "Merlin" and "Little Britain." Head's death was attributed to complications from pneumonia.

headline: US and Iran exchange strikes in Gulf in latest test of ceasefire
summary: The US military announced it struck Iranian drones and radar sites in the Gulf region. Iran quickly retaliated by targeting US military bases located in Kuwait and Bahrain. These exchanges mark the latest challenge to the ongoing ceasefire between the two nations.

headline: Ex-Channel 4 News host Jon Snow reveals he has Alzheimer's
summary: Jon Snow, the prominent former lead presenter of Channel 4 News, has publicly revealed his diagnosis of Alzheimer's disease. Snow anchored C4 News for an impressive 32 years, becoming a household name in British journalism. A forthcoming film will document his personal journey and experience navigating the diagnosis.
